author: Thunk
text:
FIXED (cross-repo). Root cause: balls-github-plugin crate balls-plugin-github-issues, src/pull.rs::list_issues did a single unpaginated GET .../issues?state=all (GH defaults 30/page); src/pull_emit.rs::sweep_deletes then read off-page-1 stored issue numbers as deleted and, under on_external_delete=deferred, flipped live tasks to deferred.

Fix: list_issues now paginates to completion (per_page=100, follows Link rel=next); a page-fetch error propagates so the caller bails before the sweep (a partial listing is never authoritative for deletion). Stale 'pagination is a future concern' docs in pull.rs/commands/sync.rs/pull_emit.rs corrected. New tests: list_issues_follows_pagination, next_page_url_parsing. Full gate green (clippy, line-length, 100% coverage 741/741).

Delivery is in the SIBLING repo /home/mark/dev/balls-github-plugin (no balls-core code): commit 8568141 on main, merged via --no-ff c98e6b7. Binary redeployed with 'make install' to ~/.local/bin/balls-plugin-github-issues.

Re-enabled github-issues in /home/mark/dev/balls/.balls/config.json (the human's disable was an uncommitted per-clone runtime mitigation; balls main already had enabled=true).

Live verification: ran the fixed binary's sync against mudbungie/balls (331 issues) with all 31 current tasks (26 carrying issue numbers) -> 0 defer emissions, 0 false updates. Pre-fix this deferred 5 (bl-72a8, bl-b5c0, bl-d7a5, bl-0802, bl-37b1).

author: Thunk
text: Paginate github-issues list_issues to stop false delete-sweep defers (fix in sibling plugin repo, commit 8568141; binary redeployed; plugin re-enabled)
